summary: Tested mobile PWA features for iteration 36: header sizing, currency (€), parent dashboard team-first navigation, profile page with avatar upload and edit mode, Going/Not Going availability. All backend tests passed (13/13). All frontend features verified working.
test_credentials: Parent OTP login: phone='99555666' at /app/login. OTP returned in debug response.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA features all working: header sizing (w-10 logo, text-xs title), € currency, parent dashboard with team-first navigation (home→team→child views), profile page with avatar upload and edit mode (phone locked), Going/Not Going availability buttons.
